title: Robust Roasted Japanese Rocket Okonomiyaki
description: A funky and shattering solo-dinner Japanese dish featuring rocket and double-rise-bread, with anti-inflammatory friendly ingredients, in the form of okonomiyaki.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together okonomiyaki sauce, mayonnaise, bonito flakes, salt, and pepper.
Add the chopped Japanese rocket, torn bread, and chopped green onions to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a non-stick skillet or okonomiyaki pan.
Cook over medium heat for 5 minutes, until the bottom is lightly browned.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15 minutes, until the top is lightly browned and the okonomiyaki is cooked through.
Remove the skillet from the oven and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
Let it cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
Garnish with additional green onions and bonito flakes if desired.
